title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates scaling his AI Dark Factory by combining Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 models. Opus handles deep reasoning and planning while Kimi K2.6 manages implementation and validation, optimizing token efficiency across the self-shipping codebase system.
